response.justification: Although the candidate possesses an exceptionally strong technical background with Staff-level engineering experience at top-tier tech companies, they fall short on two critical requirements for this executive role. First, their German language proficiency is only 'Basic', whereas the role strictly requires a minimum of C1 for client advisory. Second, their experience is primarily focused on Individual Contributor (IC) roles rather than the executive-level operational leadership and team management expected of a Head of Development.
strengths: Extensive experience in modern software development and architecture at top-tier companies (Google, Meta).
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux environments, and full-stack development.
Demonstrated ability to mentor others through technical workshops, courses, and organizing code dojos.
concerns: Lacks the required minimum C1 German language proficiency (listed as Basic).
Missing executive-level operational leadership and dedicated team management experience.
No explicit mention of UML expertise, IT security/compliance focus, or Python.
